sprint.goal: KE-9: Browser governance invariants + irreversible action detection + blocker fix (#1384, #1385, #1473). #1449 complete.

senior.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
senior.note: Reassigned from #1449 (COMPLETE — PR #1469 merged). Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Same pattern as persona.env exemption (PR #1212). Then begin #1384 browser governance implementation: add browser.* action class to packages/core/src/actions.ts and stub invariant definitions.

secondary.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
secondary.note: Begin prototype this cycle. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Start with packages/kernel/src/decision.ts hook: detect irreversible flag, emit PauseRequested. Design headless/cron auto-deny timeout path. No PR yet — 3 cycles in design phase.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.note: Director escalation unresolved after 4 days. Kernel senior assigned to fix directly.
